PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-25-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark S. Bridges, Esq., counsel for Frank Saul III, Petitioner (appearing by video conferencing).

The Court notes that the matter before the Court is consideration of admission of a lost will. Mr. Bridges affirms that no objection to the Petition has been received or filed. For consideration is whether the presumptions of Probate Code Sec. 6124 have been overcome. After discussion and review of the supporting pleadings, the Court finds that the Petitioner has submitted sufficient evidence to overcome Probate Code Sec. 6124 presumptions and admits the copy of the lost will dated August 18, 2006 into probate administration. Mr. Bridges directs the Court's attention to an error on the proposed Order which the Court corrects.
The Court grants the Petition appointing Frank Saul III the Executor of the Estate of Suzanne M. Saul, signing the Order for same in open court. The Court sets hearing for status of the close of the estate for November 8, 2021 at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
